## Summary

- what changed
- why it changed

## Testing

- [ ] `cd backend && .venv/bin/python -m compileall app`
- [ ] `cd frontend && npx next build --webpack`
- [ ] relevant manual flow tested

## Manual verification

Describe the exact flow you tested. Example:

- uploaded a sample receipt
- confirmed OCR output
- reviewed extracted fields
- saved an expense
- checked workspace, export, or delete flow

## Screenshots

If the UI changed, add screenshots or a short screen recording.

## Notes

Anything reviewers should pay extra attention to?
